mapper.select:
SELECT id, emp_id AS empId, emp_name AS empName, task_type AS taskType, sn_code1 AS snCode1, sn_code2 AS snCode2, sn_code3 AS snCode3, sn_code4 AS snCode4, sn_code5 AS snCode5, sn_code6 AS snCode6, sn_code7 AS snCode7, sn_code8 AS snCode8, sn_code9 AS snCode9, sn_code10 AS snCode10, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM fqc_employee_task
is_deleted = 0
AND emp_id = #{queryParams.empId}
AND emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.empName}, '%')
AND task_type = #{queryParams.taskType}
AND ( sn_code1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code3 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code4 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code5 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code6 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code7 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code8 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code9 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') OR sn_code10 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%') )
ORDER BY updateTime DESC, task_type ASC
